The '''Muugrah system''' was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] which contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Muugrah]] and was located in the middle ground between the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core]] and the Frontier, but slightly closer to the Frontier. It was just off a trade route in a [[Sector/Legends|sector]] where [[Pirate/Legends|piracy]] was a problem. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] devoted a substantial amount of its local resources to combating this criminal activity. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] also partially relaxed restrictions on starship weaponry for this reason.
